parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the specified. Accepts patterns, as described in the Scripting Guide under .

parameters.name: firstu
parameters.label: First U
parameters.description: Enables the parameter to set the first position in U.

parameters.name: domainu1
parameters.label: First U
parameters.description: This specifies a starting location to begin the cut/extract. Select this and a parametric U location between 0 and 1.

parameters.name: secondu
parameters.label: Second U
parameters.description: Enables the parameter to set the second position in U.

parameters.name: domainu2
parameters.label: Second U
parameters.description: This specifies an ending location to complete the cut / extract. Select this and a parametric U location between 0 and 1.

parameters.name: firstv
parameters.label: First V
parameters.description: Enables the parameter to set the first position in V.

parameters.name: domainv1
parameters.label: First V
parameters.description: This specifies a starting location to begin the cut/extract. Select this and a parametric V location between 0 and 1. Applies only to surfaces.

parameters.name: secondv
parameters.label: Second V
parameters.description: Enables the parameter to set the second position in V.

parameters.name: domainv2
parameters.label: Second V
parameters.description: This specifies an ending location to complete the cut / extract. Select this and a parametric V location between 0 and 1. Applies only to surfaces.

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Carve Method
parameters.description: Select between Cut and Extract methods.

parameters.name: keepin
parameters.label: Keep Inside
parameters.description: Keep the primitives specified between the first and second locations.

parameters.name: keepout
parameters.label: Keep Outside
parameters.description: Keep the primitives lying outside the first and second locations.

parameters.name: extractop
parameters.label: Extract Type
parameters.description: If enabled, it will extract a cross-section along each location specified above.

parameters.name: keeporiginal
parameters.label: Keep Original
parameters.description: If selected, it will not remove the original primitive.

parameters.name: location
parameters.label: Location
parameters.description: Determines how the Cut/Extract is defined at the boundaries. Additionally, extra subdivisions can be added in two ways using the parameters below.

parameters.name: divsu
parameters.label: U Divisions
parameters.description: This specifies the number of cuts / extracts to be performed between first U and the second U.

parameters.name: divsv
parameters.label: V Divisions
parameters.description: Specifies the number of cuts/extracts to be performed between first V and second V.

parameters.name: allubreakpoints
parameters.label: Cut at All Internal U Breakpoints
parameters.description: When using Location = Breakpoints, the resulting primitive is divided at all U breakpoints into separate primitives.

parameters.name: allvbreakpoints
parameters.label: Cut at All Internal V Breakpoints
parameters.description: When using Location = Breakpoints, the resulting primitive is divided at all V breakpoints into separate primitives.

examples.label: Configure Second U and Second U
examples.code:
n = op('carve1')
n.par.secondu = True
n.par.domainu2 = 1
n.par.firstv = True
examples.description: Common settings from 11 real Derivative examples
